description: Project scaffolding: create folder structure, requirements.txt, .env.example, and .gitignore. Initialize Python virtual environment.
Tripletex API client: implement authentication (session token via consumer/employee token) and a base HTTP client with retry logic. Verify we can fetch company info from /company.
Document ingestion - PDF and image support: implement a document loader that reads PDFs (pdfplumber) and images (Pillow), converts pages to base64 for Claude vision.

AI extraction layer: use Claude claude-3-5-sonnet with vision to extract structured accounting fields (vendor, date, amount, VAT, line items, currency) from ingested documents. Return typed Pydantic models.
Email ingestion: implement IMAP client to connect to a mailbox, fetch unread emails, extract PDF/image attachments, and pass them to the document loader.
Data validation and transformation: validate extracted data against Tripletex schema requirements (account codes, VAT types, currency codes). Map extracted fields to Tripletex API payload format.
Tripletex posting: implement posting of supplier invoices (vouchers) to Tripletex via POST /ledger/voucher. Handle duplicate detection and error responses.
Orchestration - main agent loop: tie all modules together. Watch an inbox folder and/or poll email, process each document end-to-end, log results, mark emails as read.

Structured logging and error handling: implement per-run JSON log entries recording document source, extracted fields, Tripletex response, and any errors. Add retry and dead-letter queue for failed postings.
End-to-end test with a real sample invoice: run the full pipeline on a test PDF invoice, verify Tripletex receives the correct voucher, write a summary in problems_log.md.
